systemStatus.headline: Sun Jul 12 7 AM run: all four live sources refreshed. Sat Jul 11 was a strong day -- $10,005.52 net on 16.9% labor.
systemStatus.detail: Sun Jul 12 7 AM run -- full refresh, no gaps except the ones noted. TOAST: Sat Jul 11 group summary arrived 6:29 AM PT. Net $10,005.52 / gross $10,229.70 / 403 guests / 235 orders / avg per guest $24.83 / labor 16.9% of net ($1,690.93 derived) / 22 void items / 0 open orders. Best labor percentage in over a week. Net is +161.3% vs SDLW, but SDLW (Sat Jul 4) was the July 4th holiday at only $3,829.55 net -- treat that swing as noise, not signal. Checks / avg check / void $ still pending the location-level email (~7:39 AM PT). SLING: Sun Jul 12 report delivered 7:00 AM PT -- 11 employees / 12 shifts / 54.08 hours / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 1 off. GOOGLE ADS (live scrape): Jul 11 spend $68.99, the week's highest, on 7,193 impressions and only 138 clicks -- CPC jumped to $0.50 from $0.33. PMax-2 is still limited by budget AND has all asset groups limited by policy; that policy flag has persisted about a week and is the single clearest thing to fix. YELP (live scrape): billing period Jul 1-11 spend $152.11, CPC $0.99, CPL $3.31; 117 leads from ads in the last 30 days. TRIPADVISOR: 1 email, marketing promo only, no ad data. REVIEWS: unchanged from the 4 AM run -- 4 unanswered, Patrick Williams 5* now 17 days old (OVERDUE).

toast.source: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary email (The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group, Sat Jul 11), parsed from HTML on the Sun Jul 12 7 AM run.
toast.note: SAT JUL 11 (group email, 6:29 AM PT): Net $10,005.52 / Gross $10,229.70 / 403 guests / 235 orders / avg per guest $24.83 / avg per order $42.58 / discounts 2.2% of gross ($225.05 derived) / labor 16.9% of net ($1,690.93 derived) / refunds $0 / 22 void items / 213 card payments / 0 open orders. Auto-clocked out: Grant Danely. Net +161.3% vs SDLW, but SDLW (Sat Jul 4) was the July 4th holiday at only $3,829.55 net -- a heavily depressed baseline, so that % swing is not a real trend. Checks, avg check and void $ amount are NOT in the group email; the LOCATION-level email (~7:39 AM PT) will fill them tomorrow.

sling.note: TODAY (Sun Jul 12) Sling daily report delivered 7:00 AM PT: 11 employees / 12 shifts / 54.08 hours / 0 uncovered / 0 overtime / 1 employee off. Sarah Palmer covers two shifts (Barista 6:30A-12:30P and Busser 1:00P-3:00P), which is why 11 people map to 12 shifts. Hours down 6.42 vs Sat Jul 11 (60.50).

yelpAds.note: Sun Jul 12 ~7:12 AM LIVE Chrome scrape. Last 30d: 29.2k ad impressions (72% of 40.2k total), 399 ad clicks, 512 page visits from ads (55% of 928), 117 leads from ads (59% of 199). Billing period Jul 1-11: $152.11 spend, $0.99 CPC, $3.31 CPL -- that is $21.57 added on Jul 11 alone vs a ~$13/day running average, so Saturday ran hot on Yelp too. Bonus budget remaining is still not surfaced anywhere on the ads dashboard.
